title: Earning can feel light
subtitle: An affirmation for when the work-must-be-hard belief is running your relationship with money.
excerpt: A short affirmation for when earning feels like it only counts if it involves sacrifice. Say it at the start of any working day when the pull to struggle is louder than the work itself.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 10 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Let go of 'money is hard to earn'."

content.text: A short affirmation for the belief that earning only counts if it's difficult. The statement gives permission for work to be good and light at the same time.
Earning can feel light. The work I do is enough. I am safe to charge for it, keep it, and let more come.
Say it three times before starting work. If "light" feels too far, start with: "I am practising the idea that earning doesn't have to be hard." That step is the practice.
Adapted from Day 10 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), which addresses the belief that struggle is the only legitimate route to income.
